article_title: 从零搭建你的第一个 MCP 服务端（C# 快速上手）
core_theme: 用 C# 搭建本地 stdio MCP 服务端的最短路径——控制台应用 + SDK + Host + 属性标注工具，配好 VS Code 就能跑
reader_takeaway: 能在 5 分钟内从零搭起一个可工作的本地 MCP 服务端，并接入 VS Code 或 Claude Desktop
summary_angle: 从 dotnet new console 到 AI 宿主发现工具的全流程——三条主线：创建项目、写工具方法、接入宿主

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文创建项目和 Program.cs 章节：dotnet new console，AddMcpServer+StdioTransport+ToolsFromAssembly
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个终端窗口或控制台图标，带 dotnet 命令提示和 NuGet 包引用标注

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文写工具方法章节：[McpServerTool] 属性和 Description 标注的 Echo 和 FormatWorkItem 方法
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个带属性标签的方法卡片或函数签名浮层，标注 [McpServerTool]

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文接入 VS Code 和 Claude Desktop 章节：mcp.json 配置 stdio 命令和路径
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个配置文件图标连向 VS Code 或编辑器标识

main_metaphor: 一条从终端到 AI 宿主的流水线——左侧控制台启动服务端进程，中间工具方法被属性标注暴露，右侧 AI 宿主发现并调用
primary_subject: 一条从左到右的三段式流水线，连接控制台、工具卡片和 AI 宿主
subject_action: 左侧 dotnet 命令行启动进程，中间工具方法卡片浮出，右侧 VS Code/Claude 图标接收连接
composition: 水平从左到右的三段推进式布局
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: transparent blue skies, dramatic backlight, detailed clouds, youthful cinematic lighting, rain and reflection details, no artist imitation
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中；新海诚风格的光影通透感适合表达'从零开始搭建、第一次跑通'的清爽技术体验
style_safety_note: 原风格名强指向在世作者，最终 prompt 只使用光影、天空、云层、反射等非仿冒描述，不要求复刻特定导演或工作室风格
draft_goal: 先验证'三段流水线 + 通透光影氛围 + 三个步骤标签可读'
revision_targets: 光影是否过重导致信息块不清晰
天空/云层背景与前景工具卡片的对比度
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover. Theme: build your first MCP server in C#. From dotnet new console to AI host discovering your tool — three steps: create project with SDK and Host, write a tool method with McpServerTool attribute, configure the host in mcp.json. The reader should feel the clear, fresh journey of building something that works.

Summary angle: from dotnet new console to AI host tool discovery — three beats: create project, write tool method, connect to host.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- step: a terminal or console icon with dotnet command hints and NuGet package references, labeled in Chinese for create project
- step: a method card or function signature with McpServerTool attribute tags, labeled in Chinese for write tool method
- step: a config file icon connecting to a VS Code or editor logo, labeled in Chinese for connect to host

Main metaphor: a pipeline from terminal to AI host — left console starts the server process, middle tool methods are exposed via attributes, right AI host discovers and calls them.
Subject: a three-segment horizontal pipeline connecting console, tool card, and AI host icon.
Subject action: left dotnet command launches process, middle tool card with attributes floats out, right VS Code icon receives connection.
Composition/framing: horizontal left-to-right three-segment progressive layout.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: transparent blue skies, dramatic backlight, detailed clouds, youthful cinematic lighting, rain and reflection details, no artist imitation. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: sky blue, cloud white, warm light accent.
Visible text policy: allow only short Chinese labels. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real product UI screenshots, code rain, floating chips, neon backgrounds, cyberpunk purple-blue, HUD overlays, fake terminal output.
